title: Roles in Treasury and Risk Management
toc_path: Roles in Treasury and Risk Management
body_html:
Roles in Treasury and Risk Management

Treasury and Risk Management offers you the following roles:

Business Roles for SAP Fiori Launchpad

SAP_BR_TREASURY_RISK_MANAGER

Treasury Risk Manager

Leads the treasury department. Evaluates financial statuses and performs overall reporting. Manages traders and their authorizations.

SAP_BR_TREASURY_SPECIALIST_FOE

Treasury Specialist - Front Office

Concludes and manages financial transactions to hedge foreign exchange and interest rate risks.

SAP_BR_TREASURY_SPECIALIST_MOE

Treasury Specialist - Middle Office

Monitors financial risks, such as credit risks and market risks. Is responsible for mitigation of risks in compliance with the corporate treasury guidelines (hedging policy) and ensures conformity with accounting regulations.

SAP_BR_TREASURY_SPECIALIST_BOE

Treasury Specialist - Back Office

Processes financial transactions, manages correspondence and sends confirmations to counterparties, imports market data, and calculates net present values.

SAP_BR_TREASURY_ACCOUNTANT

Treasury Accountant

Processes and valuates the treasury positions and makes the relevant postings in Financial Accounting to ensure the accurate portrayal of treasury activities.
